description: Writing exercise of legal documents. The writer copied the same part of a legal document five times. Dated: Monday, 9 Shevaṭ 1639 Seleucid = 21 January 1328 CE. Concerns al-Shaykh al-Asʿad b. al-Shaykh al-Sadīd Abū Naṣr. On verso there is rhymed wisdom poetry and jottings. (Information from CUDL.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-14. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
